ddls:
CREATE TABLE "epidemiological_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the data was collected */,
  "confirmed_cases" INTEGER /* Number of confirmed cases on the given date */,
  "number_of_deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths on the given date */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the source of the data */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used for data collection */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any relevant notes or comments about the data */,
  "recovered_cases" INTEGER /* Number of recovered cases on the given date */,
  "active_cases" INTEGER /* Number of active cases (calculated as confirmed cases - recovered cases - number of deaths) */,
  "vaccination_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the population that is vaccinated */,
  "test_positivity_rate" REAL /* Percentage of positive tests out of total tests conducted */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country on the given date */,
  "hospitalization_rate" REAL /* Percentage of confirmed cases that require hospitalization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_epidemiological_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_epidemiological_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the country is located */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Current population of the country */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language of the country */,
  "health_ministry_website" TEXT /* URL of the country's health ministry website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., Government, Research Institute) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person at the data source */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data source was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., health official, researcher, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or organization the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES epidemiological_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file (e.g., CSV, JSON, XML) */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the file to ensure data integrity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES epidemiological_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry the note belongs to */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note or comment */,
  "note_date" TEXT /* Date the note was added */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the note */,
  "is_important" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the note is important */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_notes_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES epidemiological_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_notes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_data" (
  "vaccination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination data entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corresponding `epidemiological_data` entry */,
  "vaccination_date" TEXT /* Date when the vaccination data was recorded */,
  "total_vaccinations" INTEGER /* Total number of vaccinations administered */,
  "first_dose" INTEGER /* Number of first doses administered */,
  "second_dose" INTEGER /* Number of second doses administered */,
  "booster_doses" INTEGER /* Number of booster doses administered */,
  "vaccination_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the population that is vaccinated */,
  "vaccination_coverage" TEXT /* Coverage area (e.g., national, regional) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vaccination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_data_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES epidemiological_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interventions" (
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each intervention */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corresponding `epidemiological_data` entry */,
  "intervention_date" TEXT /* Date when the intervention was implemented */,
  "intervention_type" TEXT /* Type of intervention (e.g., lockdown, travel restrictions, mask mandates) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the intervention */,
  "effectiveness" TEXT /* Measured effectiveness of the intervention */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("intervention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interventions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES epidemiological_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., health official, researcher, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_map" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role mapping */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_map_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_map_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
